lead.description: Create lead (future) values for specified columns

columns.description: Column(s) to create lead values for

time_column.description: Time column to sort by before calculating lead values

group_columns.description: Columns to group by before calculating lead values (for panel data)

suffix.description: Suffix to add to the names of lead columns

outputs.description: Function that creates lead values in a TimeSeriesPipe

lag.description: Create lag (past) values for specified columns

columns.description: Column(s) to create lag values for

time_column.description: Time column to sort by before calculating lag values

group_columns.description: Columns to group by before calculating lag values (for panel data)

suffix.description: Suffix to add to the names of lag columns

outputs.description: Function that creates lag values in a TimeSeriesPipe

variance_analysis.description: Calculate variance and standard deviation for time series data

time_column.description: Time column to sort by before calculations

group_columns.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data)

suffix.description: Suffix to add to column names

outputs.description: Function that calculates variance in a TimeSeriesPipe

distribution_analysis.description: Analyze the distribution of values in specified columns

group_columns.description: Columns to group by before analysis

outputs.description: Function that analyzes distributions in a TimeSeriesPipe

cumulative_distribution.description: Calculate cumulative distribution for specified columns

group_columns.description: Columns to group by before calculation

suffix.description: Suffix to add to column names

outputs.description: Function that calculates cumulative distributions in a TimeSeriesPipe

custom_calculation.description: Apply a custom calculation function to the time series data

func.description: Custom function to apply to the data

outputs.description: Function that applies custom calculation in a TimeSeriesPipe
